title: LOVE IS RESPECT - 211info
text: NATIONAL DOMESTIC VIOLENCE HOTLINE LOVE IS RESPECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hotline with one-on-one, confidential support. Trained advocates can offer emotional support, education, safety planning information, crisis intervention, and local resource referrals for situations relating to healthy relationships and dating abuse. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (737) 225-3150 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (737) 225-3150 Hotline (866) 331-9474 Text Short Code 22522 Text LOVEIS INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or text for information. Visit website for live chat. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide (including US territories) Services: Dating Abuse Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - NATIONAL DOMESTIC VIOLENCE HOTLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
